rationale: Gov't Code §2001.062 governs contested-case procedure (proposals for decision, exceptions, briefs). It is unrelated to property tax exemptions or homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: Sec. 2001.062. EXAMINATION OF RECORD BY STATE AGENCY; PROPOSAL FOR DECISION.
_note: No conflict: the cited rule concerns administrative contested-case procedure, not tax exemption policy.
